{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174232E679BF45C6AACE2BDF61"}"},"total":363},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585587288929370942","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很好看,尤其是在描写吕布为了貂蝉跟孙悟空大战几百回合,但是薛宝钗确实太强了,要不是有诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台,这波m4六倍扫射必死,除此之外,我比较欣赏诸葛亮对花果山108个猴子说的一句话“小伙一身傲骨别在你亮哥面前摆谱”,表现出诸葛亮对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨,总而言之,这本书情节有趣,体系明确伏笔众多,打斗场面如身临其境,人物性格描述很到位!★★★★★阅读40小时后追评写的真不搓!","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":22,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774258952CE2BDF61%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227585587288929370942%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227469397132936481816%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766160137,"group_id":"7469397132936481816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2X3uojQ0oJ3sGRm2Volea4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"70014496675888","user_name":"喜欢食虫类的冯振宇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"70014496675888","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7469397132936481816","book_info":{"abstract":"前文明的半律者墨白，接受了虚数之树和量子之海的洗礼，成为了终焉之茧，来到了斩神世界。
然而在穿越中却失去了大部分的力量。
只要不断击杀神秘，夺取神明的神力，就可以恢复自身。
踏着神明的尸骨，祝我登临终焉。
法理之王
空间之王
征服之王
渴望之王
…………
“我是律者，文明的毁灭者”
“我是人类，文明的传火者”
万物皆因我而始，万物皆因我而终。
“我一人，即是文明。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3e483ebcadd5cb7f7c0e10c016163748","author":"远方的海","author_id":"","book_id":"7469397132936481816","book_name":"斩神：终焉代理人，开局理之律者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302860","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7474951735522378265","read_count":"31202","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"784494"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"285","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,开局,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o101163e5a2905c4a8b4a7ae7b66f4a0f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442952&x-signature=CvOx9V%2FajTuuIsIzf%2F8MHuHJN%2BQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4023868788582973","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"175"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174232E679BF45C6AACE2BDF61"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":93,"forwarded_count":0," 愿愚戏之匣爱佑其身，赋予『螺旋』的奇迹 愿璀耀之歌爱佑其身，赋予『黄金』的光辉
